{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221956526EF6D0253F9084F9D8DE"}"},"total":231},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588456979474694936","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很特别的美食文！喜欢历史穿越文和美食文的都有福了。副本都很有意思（品鉴中）😋"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766828757,"group_id":"7582224420211543064","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人不管走到哪一步，总得找点乐子，想一点办法","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Hw5YPYhYSDEdbtcjKBXdUY2kixmwn6Iv9jvtVTnWsL","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3ad27a92cd594de1864209cdc2eb13bd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710290&x-signature=QOz%2FiqvwVGGiIBobsqHkGgaSLoY%3D","user_id":"3263809535095232","user_name":"正面与我对决"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3263809535095232","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582224420211543064","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚开，后面会涨】【美食 + 下饭 + 历史副本 + 日常 + 治愈】
应禾突然得知老爸给他留了两百万的负债，继承的祖传酒楼即将不保。
幸好酒楼自带系统，能让他穿越到过去寻找菜谱。
原以为十拿九稳，谁知第一站竟是去鸿门宴给刘邦项羽做菜。
好不容易得到两位大佬的认可，后面的难度一个比一个高。
在金陵城外，目睹铁血帝王为妻子留下的第一滴泪。
大漠深处，与少年将军痛饮烈酒。
马嵬坡下，见证大唐盛世的由盛转衰……
应禾是历史的过客，也是人间的厨子。
当他把这些沾染了历史的菜肴带回现实，这家酒楼，卖疯了。
每一道菜，都成了食客们念念不忘的暖心滋味。
面对米其林上门评级的请求，
应禾回头看了眼后厨。
因为甜咸之争吵得不可开交的苏东坡和西楚霸王，还有提着五粮液，醉醺醺地要在菜单上写诗的李太白……
他微微一笑：我想，米其林星级，在五千年面前好像不是很够看。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dfcd4112fd0cb598f98125982e2372ab","author":"载北以南","author_id":"","book_id":"7582224420211543064","book_name":"开局小酒楼，店里员工全是古人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#502818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582224464297853464","read_count":"17877","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"545366"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"247","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,美食,系统,穿越,副本","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0bee1aff2d44bf4184545bbcb0bfa884~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364612&x-signature=I3Y%2FvSU4Fkj9tVxg7v8utMe9oug%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"85553910962","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"38"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221956526EF6D0253F9084F9D8DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du
